title: Python Merhaba Dunya
subtitle: Basit Python konsol programi ornegi.
code:
print("Merhaba, Playground!")

name = "Dunya"
print("Merhaba, " + name + "!")

# f-string ile
greeting = f"Selam, {name}! Python ile kod yaziyoruz."
print(greeting)

# Sayilarla islem
numbers = [5, 12, 8, 1, 9, 3]
print("Sayilar:", numbers)
print("En buyuk sayi:", max(numbers))
print("En kucuk sayi:", min(numbers))
print("Toplam:", sum(numbers))
